name: 太阳系
subject: physics
domain_name: 空间物理 / Space Physics / Space Physics
curriculum_points: 1 Define speed as distance travelled per unit time; recall and use the equation s v = t
2 Define velocity as speed in a given direction
3 Recall and use the equation total distance travelled average speed = total time taken
4 Sketch, plot and interpret distance–time and speed–time graphs
